title: Glitterstar
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
'''''Glitterstar''''' was a popular [[Luxury liner/Legends|luxury cruise liner]]. During the aftermath of the [[Palpatine/Legends|Emperor's]] final defeat, ''Glitterstar'' was ambushed by [[Phan Riizolo]] and the [[Invids|Invid]] [[Pirate/Legends|pirates]] aboard the ''[[Booty Full]]'' just off [[Alakatha/Legends|Alakatha]]. Thanks to a tip-off, [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]] was present to drive off the pirates, and ''Glitterstar'' was escorted back to [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] by [[Home One/Legends|''Home One'']].

==Appearances==
*''[[I, Jedi]]'' {{Ab|I, Jedi (unabridged audiobook)}}
